app.name: VisionSetil
app.tagline: Your smart guide to the world of mushrooms
app.footerDisclaimer: Orientation and educational tool. It does not replace expert mycologist advice. A wrong identification can cost a life.

safety.bannerBody: This identification is orientation-only and may be wrong. NEVER eat a mushroom based only on this result. Always consult an expert mycologist before consumption.
safety.encyclopediaDisclaimer: Educational information. VisionSetil does not recommend eating wild mushrooms. Edibility labels are mycological reference only, not permission to consume.
safety.orientationOnly: Orientation-only identification. Do not consume based on this app.

home.heroBody: Encyclopedia, visual identifier, zone map and safety guide.

encyclopedia.title: Mycological encyclopedia
encyclopedia.subtitle: Explore Iberian species with photos, descriptions and key data
encyclopedia.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, family or description…

identify.title: Identify mushroom
identify.subtitle: Upload photos from multiple views for more reliable identification

viewHint.front: Front or top view of the cap

identify.coachTip1: Front natural light; avoid strong backlight
identify.coachTip2: Fill the frame with the mushroom
identify.coachTip3: Include stem and base when possible
identify.coachTip4: More views = better guidance (never 100 percent safe)
identify.wizardSubtitle: Gills, profile, habitat and detail. Complete the critical ones before analyzing.

readiness.missing_habitat: Missing habitat view: improves ecological evidence (recommended).
readiness.missing_detail: Missing stem/ring/volva detail: reduces lookalike confusion.
readiness.missing_required: Critical views pending: {{views}}. You can submit with a warning, but open-set may reject.
readiness.hard_blocked: Strict mode: add critical views (gills and front) before analyzing.

identify.bannerLead: Guided multi-view. If unsure, it stays quiet. Better than inventing.

error.defaultDescription: Please try again in a moment.
error.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network or that the backend is running.
error.timeout: Identification took too long. Try fewer photos or retry.
error.viewTypes: View labels are not valid. Use only: gills, front, habitat, detail.
error.badRequest: The server rejected the request. Check your photos and try again.
error.unauthorized: You are not allowed to identify. Check the API key.
error.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. Wait a moment and retry.
error.client: The request could not be completed (client error).
error.server: The server failed while processing identification. Retry in a moment.

result.rejectedHint: For safety, treat every unidentified mushroom as potentially dangerous.

low.label: Low confidence
low.description: The model is unsure. The identification may be wrong.

moderate.label: Moderate confidence
moderate.description: The model has a reasonable idea, but uncertainty remains significant.

high.label: High confidence
high.description: The model is fairly sure, but human verification is still essential.

result.humanReviewBody: This case has low confidence. An expert should review it.
result.outOfCatalogHint: The model suggests this taxon, but it is not in the app catalog (no species card or curated media).
result.dangerBody: The top match is in category {{category}}. Keep away from children and pets.
result.addViewCtaHint: Open the matching multi-view wizard slot
result.feedbackThanks: Thanks for your feedback. It helps improve the model.

api.offlineBody: Browse encyclopedia without backend. Identify needs API on :8000.

detail.foodQualityUnknown: No documented food quality in our sources.
detail.foodQualityUnknownHint: We do not invent edibility. Iberian curated base + toxic list only.
detail.emptyMorphologyBody: No curated morphology yet. Use the gallery and habitat as educational cues.
detail.emptyHabitatBody: No curated habitat note for this species in the local catalog.
detail.emptyLookalikesBody: No curated lookalikes on this card. Try the comparison studio.

mode.blocked: Identification blocked: model below quality threshold

preflight.offline: API unavailable. Identification cannot run now.
preflight.blocked: Species identification not allowed: the model does not meet the quality threshold.
preflight.mock: Demo mode: demonstration predictions, not field identification.
preflight.metrics_warning: Model metrics below threshold (gate disabled). Confidence is hidden.
preflight.submit_offline: No network response from the API. Connect the backend to submit photos.
preflight.submit_offline_empty: The API responded without a usable readiness payload (e.g. 503). Identification stays disabled until the backend is ready.
preflight.unknown: Model status unknown. Identification is orientation-only.

decision.rejected_gate: Identification blocked by the model quality threshold

honesty.confidence_hidden: Confidence is not available in this mode
honesty.educational_blocked_body: The current model does not meet the quality threshold for species identification. Use the encyclopedia and consult an expert mycologist. This app is orientation and educational only.

loading.hint: Real request stages — no invented model percentage.

gallery.empty: No extra gallery — showing main photo or illustration.

lookalike.title: Possible confusions
lookalike.hint: Risk as orientation only — not edible chrome.
lookalike.studioSubtitle: Place up to three mushrooms side by side. Photos, risk and family — to study confusions, not to decide dinner.
lookalike.emptyBody: Search by common or scientific name, or tap a high-risk suggestion.
lookalike.tableLead: Read horizontally. Risk is safety orientation, not edibility.
lookalike.suggestLead: High risk or same family — ideal for lookalike practice.
lookalike.tip: Tip: add a same-family lookalike or a deadly taxon to contrast characters.

notebook.title: Field notebook
notebook.subtitle: Local history with notes and tags. Orientation only — not a consumption diary.
notebook.reviewBody: Rejections, risky lookalikes, or human-review flag.
notebook.clearConfirm: Delete the entire local notebook? This cannot be undone.
notebook.emptyBody: Identify a mushroom and it will be saved here with room for field notes.
notebook.emptyFilterBody: No observations with mode “{{mode}}” and date “{{date}}”. Try other filters.
notebook.notesPlaceholder: Habitat, smell, nearby tree… (no consumption advice)
notebook.detailDisclaimer: Local orientation only. Does not authorize consumption or certify the ID.

quiz.dailyBody: {{rounds}} rounds · {{seconds}} s · same challenge all day. Documented food quality only — we never invent edibles.
quiz.deckMeta: Deck: {{count}} documented mushrooms · *educational reference, not permission to eat
quiz.doneBody: {{rounds}} rounds resolved. Educational orientation only — not permission to consume.

prompt.name: What is this mushroom called?
prompt.food: What documented food quality does it have?

map.title: Mycological zones map
map.subtitle: Educational hotspots and live conditions. Red = unfavorable. Not permission to forage or eat.
map.weatherAllFailed: No weather data right now. The map still works with zone cards and indicative species.
map.pickZoneBody: Tap a marker or board card. Halos show favorable condition hotspots (educational).
map.disclaimer: Does not authorize foraging or consumption. Check local rules and a mycologist. Map is educational.
map.emptyFilterBody: Try another region or alert level.
map.weatherErrorBody: Live conditions could not be loaded. You can still explore the zone card (species and habitat).

extreme.label: Unfavorable
extreme.advisory: Dry soil or poor fruiting conditions

severe.label: Poor
severe.advisory: Mediocre conditions; low chance of mushrooms

good.label: Favorable
good.advisory: Humidity and temperature favorable for fruiting

offline.title: Offline pack
offline.subtitle: Download the season or priority pack to browse species cards offline. Does not classify offline.
offline.confirmClear: Remove the offline pack saved on this device?
offline.statusMetaOnly: Metadata pack ready. Images could not be cached (CORS/network).
offline.disclaimer: Cards and photos only. Does not identify mushrooms offline or authorize consumption.
offline.emptyBody: No taxa available for this pack.

pwa.hint: Install VisionSetil for quick access and offline packs.
